title: Spicy Guk Stir Fry
description: A classic Chinese dish made with the rich, savory flavor of guk and the spicy kick of intensely nutty korean chili flakes.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced guk and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the intensely nutty korean chili flakes and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the shredded epoisses (if using) and cook until melted and bubbly.
Stir in chopped green onions and cook for an additional 1 minute.
